target.title: fix(auto-reply): clear delivered pending final before abort
target.body:
## Summary

- Clear durable `pendingFinalDelivery` state immediately after a final reply is successfully delivered.
- Also clear `pendingFinalDeliveryIntentId` with the rest of the pending-final retry fields, matching the existing agent-command cleanup shape.
- Surface a post-delivery dispatch abort only after that cleanup completes, so cancellation reporting is preserved without stranding session state.
- Add focused regression coverage plus a real-runtime proof script for the post-send abort window.
- Restore the exact one-line plugin SDK package testing bridge required by the existing package contract guardrail after the latest `main` drift tripped CI.

Fixes #89115.
Related: #89344.

## Verification

- `./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1 src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: In the final-dispatch success path, an abort that arrived after a successful final send but before `clearPendingFinalDeliveryAfterSuccess()` could leave `pendingFinalDelivery` and its durable retry fields set. That made the reply visible to the user while later inbound work could still be blocked by stale pending-final state. This update proves the post-send abort window and clears `pendingFinalDeliveryIntentId` with the rest of the durable pending-final fields. This branch also restores the exact deprecated plugin SDK testing bridge text required by the package contract guardrail that failed on CI.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS arm64 (`Darwin 25.3.0 arm64`) with Node `v24.8.0`, at head `c2fbd3674ff3af21be58059a3f5a8dca9ae647e4`. The proof script uses production `dispatchReplyFromConfig()`, real `updateSessionStoreEntry()`/`loadSessionStore()` against an actual temporary `sessions.json`, a real empty plugin registry/hook runner, and a concrete dispatcher; it does not use Vitest mocks.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1 src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts
git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
[proof-89115] Real-runtime dispatch proof for post-send abort cleanup.
[proof-89115] session store: [tmp]/openclaw-proof-89115-cvHjdi/sessions.json
[proof-89115] before pending fields: {"pendingFinalDelivery":true,"pendingFinalDeliveryText":"proof final delivered before abort","pendingFinalDeliveryCreatedAt":2,"pendingFinalDeliveryLastAttemptAt":3,"pendingFinalDeliveryAttemptCount":4,"pendingFinalDeliveryLastError":"previous transient send failure","pendingFinalDeliveryContext":{"channel":"proof","to":"proof-user","accountId":"default"},"pendingFinalDeliveryIntentId":"intent-proof-89115"}
[proof-89115] delivered final payloads: [{"text":"proof final delivered before abort"}]
[proof-89115] abort signal after dispatch: true
[proof-89115] dispatch result: {"queuedFinal":false,"counts":{"tool":0,"block":0,"final":1}}
[proof-89115] after pending fields (loadSessionStore): {}
[proof-89115] after pending fields (raw JSON): {}
[proof-89115] All runtime assertions passed.

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/wb/Desktop/openclaw

src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts:
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  5 passed (5)

src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts:
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  22 passed (22)

node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/proof-89115-pending-final-delivery-abort.ts: passed

git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD: no output

All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 16ms on 4 files using 1 threads.

autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
overall: patch is correct (0.84)
```

Observed result after fix: The proof script seeds a real `sessions.json` entry with `pendingFinalDelivery`, pending text, timestamps, attempt count, last error, delivery context, and `pendingFinalDeliveryIntentId`. The dispatcher accepts the final payload once, then aborts immediately in the post-send window. `dispatchReplyFromConfig()` returns through the existing aborted-dispatch path (`queuedFinal:false`) while preserving the accepted final count (`final:1`), and both `loadSessionStore()` and raw persisted JSON show no pending-final fields left afterward. The focused regression test covers the same ordering in Vitest, and the package contract guardrail still sees `packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts` as the single exact deprecated bridge.

What was not tested: A live external channel transport under production load. The deterministic proof targets the exact race window at the dispatch boundary with production dispatch/session-store code and a concrete dispatcher that models an accepted channel final delivery followed by post-send abort.
target.author: baskduf
